item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President Lai Survives First Impeachment Vote
item.description: An impeachment motion against Taiwanese President William Lai failed on Tuesday, marking the first presidential impeachment vote in Taiwans history. The motion was brought by opposition lawmakers.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba Warns of Bloodbath After US Drone Sanctions
item.description: Cuban President Diaz-Canel warned of a bloodbath if the US attacks, after Washington imposed sanctions following reports Havana obtained over 300 military drones. Cuba accused the US of fabricating drone threat claims.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Would Be Involved in Taiwan Conflict, Marcos Says
item.description: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. acknowledged that due to geographic proximity, the Philippines would likely be involved in any Taiwan conflict. He also said he would discuss Japans defense posture at an upcoming summit amid Taiwan concerns.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇰🇷 Japan-South Korea to Agree on Oil Stockpiling Cooperation
item.description: Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi and South Korean President Lee Jae Myung are set to agree on a cooperative framework for securing crude oil supplies including joint stockpiling at their summit on Tuesday.

item.title: 🇱🇧 IDF Intercepts Hezbollah Drone Over South Lebanon
item.description: Israeli forces fired an interceptor missile at an apparent Hezbollah drone over southern Lebanon where troops were operating. Israel continues airstrikes in southern Lebanon despite a truce extension.

item.title: 🇲🇽 Mexico Demands Israel Respect Rights of Gaza Flotilla Nationals
item.description: Mexico called on Israeli authorities to respect the human rights of two Mexican nationals detained after the Israeli Navy intercepted a Gaza-bound aid flotilla. A South Korean activist was also detained.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Positions in Pokrovsk Nearly Cut Off
item.description: Ukraines 7th Rapid Response Corps says Russian forces control high ground and skies over northern Pokrovsk, making troop rotations and resupply nearly impossible. Analysts say those positions should have been withdrawn months ago.

item.title: ⚠️ Belarus Begins Nuclear Drills With Russia
item.description: Belarus started nuclear weapons exercises with Russia, testing the militarys ability to conduct combat operations from unplanned locations. Ukraine condemned the drills as a violation of the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Xi to Host Putin in Beijing Days After Trump Visit
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping is set to host Vladimir Putin less than a week after Donald Trump visited Beijing, as China seeks to project itself as a stable global power amid war and energy crisis. The visit underscores Beijing balancing act between Russia and US.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇸🇦 Pakistan Deploys 8,000 Troops and Fighter Jets to Saudi Arabia
item.description: Pakistan has deployed around 8,000 troops, a squadron of fighter jets and an air defense system to Saudi Arabia under a mutual defense pact during the Iran conflict. The deployment complicates Pakistans role as a neutral mediator in the Iran-US tensions.

item.title: 💰🏛️ US SEC Prepares Framework for Trading Tokenized Stocks
item.description: The Trump administration plans to unveil a framework for trading tokenized or digital versions of securities, Bloomberg News reported. The move would create new regulatory structure for crypto-based stock trading.

item.title: ⚔️🇺🇸 Pentagon Watchdog to Investigate US Boat Strikes in Caribbean
item.description: The Pentagons internal watchdog will investigate whether US attacks on boats in the Caribbean followed targeting guidelines, amid claims from outside groups that the strikes were illegal.

item.title: 💻💰 Analog Devices in Talks to Buy Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 Billion
item.description: US chipmaker Analog Devices is in advanced talks to acquire AI chip company Empower Semiconductor for about $1.5 billion in cash. The deal would expand Analog Devices presence in the AI semiconductor market.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Pauses Iran Strike, Says Nuclear Deal Possible
item.description: President Trump announced he has put an attack on Iran on hold at the request of Gulf allies and believes there is a "very good chance" of reaching a nuclear deal with Tehran.

item.title: 🛢️💰 US Extends Sanctions Waiver on Russian Oil for Vulnerable Countries
item.description: The US Treasury has extended a sanctions waiver allowing Russian seaborne oil to reach vulnerable countries, as the Iran conflict squeezes global crude supplies.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Unleashes Aerial Barrage on Ukraine as Long-Range Strikes Escalate
item.description: Russia launched a major aerial attack on Ukraine with drones and missiles, as both sides escalate long-range strikes in the ongoing war.

item.title: 🦠🇨🇩 Health Workers Race to Contain Congo Ebola Outbreak
item.description: Health workers are fighting to contain a fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo caused by a rare strain with no approved vaccine, killing nearly 120 people.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Pressure Campaign Not Moving Iran, Diplomatic Path Uncertain
item.description: Analysis shows the Trump administration pressure strategy on Iran is not achieving its goals as Tehran resists demands while the conflict risks escalating further.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian troops nearly encircled in Pokrovsk as Russian pressure mounts
item.description: Ukrainian forces holding positions in northern Pokrovsk are "almost cut off" as Russian forces dominate skies, logistics routes, and high ground around the embattled Donetsk city, according to Ukraine's 7th Rapid Response Corps.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Marcos warns Philippines would be drawn into any Taiwan conflict
item.description: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. stated that the Philippines would inevitably be involved in any conflict over Taiwan due to geographic proximity, ahead of security talks with Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi in Tokyo.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan stands ready to intervene on yen volatility amid global bond selloff
item.description: Japanese officials at G7 talks in Paris said Tokyo is prepared to act against excessive forex volatility at any time, while being mindful of the impact on US Treasury yields from any yen-buying intervention.

item.title: ✈️ Middle East war crushes tourism as Europe becomes alternative destination
item.description: The Iran conflict has led to sharp drops in tourist visits to Middle East destinations including Jordan's Petra and Tunisia's Djerba island, with European destinations benefiting as travelers stay closer to home.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Erdogan warns Iran conflict devastating global economy like a tsunami
item.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan said the Iran conflict is crushing the global economy with shockwaves spreading worldwide, creating speculative volatility that makes accurate damage assessment impossible.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia hammers Kyiv for third straight day, flattening apartment block
item.description: Russian forces launched mass drone and missile attacks on Kyiv for the third consecutive day, damaging six districts and injuring civilians. The escalation follows Ukraine's largest drone attack on Moscow this year.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇦 US pauses WWII-era joint defense board with Canada over commitments dispute
item.description: The Pentagon announced it is pausing participation in the Permanent Joint Board on Defense with Canada, accusing Ottawa of failing to meet defense commitments. The board has coordinated continental defense since 1940.
